title: achillea millefolium var. lanulosa
intro: Achillea millefolium var. lanulosa, also known as Woolly Yarrow, is a variety of the Yarrow plant, characterized by its woolly leaves and stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The health benefits of Woolly Yarrow include its ability to soothe menstrual cramps, reduce anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Woolly Yarrow can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal remedies.
